meta.name: LiteSpec Knowledge Base
meta.description: Structured documentation for LiteSpec, a DSL compiler that converts human-readable schema definitions into JSON Schema

overview.description: LiteSpec is a Domain-Specific Language (DSL) compiler that converts human-readable schema definitions into JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12). It extends standard JSON Schema with permissions, conditional validation, UI metadata, and MongoDB-specific types. Used by Go Kart for schema generation.
purpose: Replace verbose JSON Schema with concise, readable DSL syntax
Generate validation schemas from intuitive field definitions
Support permission-based access control at collection and field levels
Generate UI metadata hints for dynamic form generation
overview.integration: Go Kart loads lite-spec.js in the browser. Schema definitions are written in LiteSpec DSL, compiled to JSON Schema, and stored in the _schema_builder MongoDB collection.

fileStructure.description: A LiteSpec file contains one or more type definitions (def) and exactly one model definition. Definitions create reusable types in $defs; the model becomes the root schema.
fileStructure.comments: // Single-line comments (can appear at end of any line)

types.decimal: Precise decimal → Maps to BSON Decimal128 (MongoDB)
types.object: Nested object → use with @ref(TypeName) to reference a def block
types.array: Array of items → use array(string) for typed arrays or array @ref(TypeName) for object arrays

@required.description: Field must be present and non-empty

@exclusiveMinimum(n).description: Must be greater than n (not equal)

@exclusiveMaximum(n).description: Must be less than n (not equal)

@multipleOf(n).description: Number must be a multiple of n

@default(value).description: Default value when creating new records

@minItems(n).description: Minimum number of items in array

@maxItems(n).description: Maximum number of items in array

@uniqueItems.description: All array items must be unique

@ref(TypeName).description: Reference a defined type (def block). Creates JSON Schema $ref pointer.

trimming.@trim: Trim leading and trailing whitespace (stored as x-trim)
trimming.@startTrim: Trim only leading whitespace (stored as x-startTrim)
trimming.@endTrim: Trim only trailing whitespace (stored as x-endTrim)

@ui(componentType, order, group, lookup,.description: UI metadata for dynamic form generation. Only included when parseDSL is called with includeUI=true.

parameters.componentType: Wave CSS component type: wc-input, wc-select, wc-textarea, etc.
parameters.lookup: Lookup reference name for dropdown data
parameters.valueMember: Field to use as value from collection

@can(actions).description: Access control at field or collection level
@can(actions).notes: Multiple roles are space-separated within quotes. Collection-level @can goes on its own line inside the block.

conditionalValidation.description: Conditional validation rules using @if syntax. Generates JSON Schema allOf with if/then patterns.

conditionTypes.@enum(val1,val2): Property must be one of values

actionTypes.@required(fieldName): Make field required when condition is true

sort.description: Define default sort order for records

api.description: JavaScript API exposed by the lite-spec library

parseDSL(dslString, includeUI).description: Main compiler function. Parses LiteSpec DSL string and returns JSON Schema object.

params.includeUI: Boolean — if true, includes UI metadata in output (default: false)

parseDSL(dslString, includeUI).returns: JSON Schema object with $defs, properties, required, allOf, permissions

validateDataUsingSchema(schema, data).description: Validates data against a generated JSON Schema using AJV

handlePermExpression(expression).returns: Object with view, add, edit, delete permission arrays

handleIfExpression(expression).returns: JSON Schema if/then object for allOf array

api.browserUsage:
<script src="dist/lite-spec.min.js"></script>
<script>
  const schema = litespec.parseDSL(dslString, true);
  const result = litespec.validateDataUsingSchema(schema, data);
</script>
api.goKartUsage: Loaded via CDN or static file. Used in schema builder UI to convert LiteSpec DSL to JSON Schema stored in _schema_builder collection.

structure.$defs: Map of type definitions (from def blocks) → reusable sub-schemas
structure.title: Model name (from model block)
structure.properties: Map of field name → JSON Schema property definition
structure.allOf: Array of if/then conditional validation rules

specialHandling.dateTime: format: 'date-time' creates anyOf with empty string option for nullable dates
specialHandling.objectid: Creates string with pattern: ^$|^[a-fA-F0-9]{24}$ for MongoDB ObjectId or empty
specialHandling.references: Uses JSON Schema $ref: '#/$defs/TypeName' for type references

completeExample.description: This example defines an Address type, a Member array type with conditional validation, and a Customer model with multiple field types, conditional rules, permissions, sorting, and breadcrumb configuration.
